key_insights.insight: For women, egg quality declines with age due to long-term exposure to bodily and environmental factors.
key_insights.quote: the eggs that are here at the bottom, they've been here the whole time. And so in addition to number of eggs, we have to talk about the quality of the eggs because these eggs down here at the bottom, once you get older, they've been sitting here a long time. And that means that their chromosomes inside of them are much more likely to be abnormal than normal.

key_insights.insight: Consuming whole fat dairy products is associated with better fertility outcomes than consuming skim dairy products.
key_insights.quote: When it comes to dairy, we've seen that whole fat dairy is associated with better fertility, better ovulation than the skim dairy products, probably due to the processing.

key_insights.insight: A lower egg count does not affect the monthly probability of getting pregnant, it reduces total opportunities.
key_insights.quote: Having a lower egg count does not impact your monthly chance of getting pregnant. That's determined by age, by the proportion of these eggs that are normal or abnormal. However, if you have fewer eggs, there's fewer that I can get to grow with IVF, and you have overall less of an opportunity to grow your family.

key_insights.insight: Sleep is essential for cell repair and hormone regulation, making sufficient sleep a simple yet effective way to improve reproductive health.
key_insights.quote: Sleep is when your body heals. Sleep is when your cells repair their damage. So you need to get seven and a half to eight hours of sleep per night...Simply prioritizing getting enough sleep is the simplest thing somebody can do to try to improve their reproduction and how their hormones are made and interpreted.

key_insights.insight: Marijuana smoking, even by the male partner, can increase the risk of miscarriage.
key_insights.quote: If you smoke marijuana, even if your partner does not and is never around you when you're using it, she has a higher chance of a miscarriage just because you're smoking marijuana.

key_insights.insight: Testosterone replacement therapy (TRT) can act as male birth control and its effects might be irreversible.
key_insights.quote: TRT use makes men azoospermic, meaning having no sperm in the ejaculate...Sometimes that is irreversible.

key_insights.insight: In women with PCOS, the brain sends out the same amount of FSH, but that FSH is getting diluted amongst the more eggs that have come out and thus none get a strong enough signal to grow.
key_insights.quote: If you're born with more eggs in your vault, you are going to send out more eggs every single month...The brain doesn't know you have more eggs. So it is sending out the same amount of FSH as it normally would for a normal egg count. But that FSH is getting diluted amongst the more eggs that have come out.

key_insights.insight: The traditional mentality to infertility is so reactive and reactive approaches in this domain may result to lower chances of success.
key_insights.quote: The traditional mentality to infertility is so reactive. You have to prove to me you have a problem before I go and test it. That's the classic mentality.

actionable_advice.advice: Limit alcohol consumption to no more than four drinks per week.
actionable_advice.how_to: Spread the four drinks across multiple days or limit consumption to a single occasion.

actionable_advice.advice: Switch to whole fat dairy products rather than skim or low-fat versions.
actionable_advice.how_to: Choose whole milk, full-fat yogurt, and regular cheese over their low-fat counterparts.

actionable_advice.advice: Engage in regular moderate exercise to lower stress, combat insulin resistance and help hormones function better.
actionable_advice.how_to: Aim for at least 60 minutes of exercise most days of the week.

actionable_advice.advice: Eliminate toxic behaviors such as smoking and marijuana use.
Limit toxin exposure by avoiding cooking or storing food in plastic.
actionable_advice.how_to: Use glass or stainless steel containers for storing food. Avoid heating food in plastic containers.

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize sleep and stress reduction techniques.
actionable_advice.how_to: Aim for 7.5-8 hours of sleep. Dedicate 20 minutes each day to stress-reducing activities like meditation, nature walks, or hobbies.

actionable_advice.advice: Optimize sperm health by ejaculating between every day to every three to four days.
actionable_advice.how_to: Maintain a regular pattern of ejaculation every 1-4 days.

memorable_stories: The guest's experience of having four pregnancy losses
A patient who was blaming herself for infertility, but then it turned out to be her partner's sperm
A Facebook group sperm donor suing a lesbian couple for custody
contrarian_claims: The guest disagrees with ACOG that women not trying to get pregnant and without infertility should not check their AMH because you can't make decisions on data you don't know.
The birth control pill is not necessarily unhealthy.
Women who've been on the birth control pill for prolonged periods of time do not have diminished fertility when they come off of the pill.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Pregnancy Doctor: Pregnancy Halves Every Year After 32! If You Want 2+ Children, You Need To Know This! If You Experience This Pain, Go See A Doctor!
